improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Claude-powered AI assistant for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with 3 free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="/images/gideon-og-preview.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition and low entry point. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or messaging apps—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial mention and starting price addresses both curiosity and objection handling upfront.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try three free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade and business professionals). The subheading reinforces key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while clearly stating the free trial offer to reduce friction and encourage immediate engagement. The copy is direct, avoids hype, and builds trust by being specific about the trial.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, billed monthly—or save 30 percent with an annual plan. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the conversion moment when free trials end, reducing friction and uncertainty. It reinforces pricing transparency and highlights the value of membership, helping visitors understand exactly what to expect and encouraging them to subscribe.
